capabilities.name: Orchestrator
capabilities.note: A bounded, schema-validating AgentOrchestrator is unit-tested but not yet wired into the backend cascade.

capabilities.name: Dynamics
capabilities.note: SourceSystem declaration only; no catalogue row or mapper is registered.

capabilities.name: Yoco
capabilities.note: SourceSystem declaration only; no catalogue row or mapper is registered.

capabilities.name: Docker Compose demo
capabilities.note: Compose wiring is configuration-tested; worker mode remains disabled by default.

capabilities.name: Fireworks demo inference
capabilities.note: Provider routing is implemented, but this snapshot carries no live Fireworks proof.

capabilities.name: Local development
capabilities.note: Default local profile uses deterministic in-memory stores and offline-safe inference.

capabilities.name: MI300X vLLM demo inference
capabilities.note: MI300X/vLLM routing is configured, but live accelerator proof is intentionally not inferred.

capabilities.name: Shipment
capabilities.note: Canonical event type exists but CascadeWorker has no shipment consumer branch.

capabilities.name: Stock Update
capabilities.note: Canonical event type exists but CascadeWorker has no stock-update consumer branch.

capabilities.name: Evaluate
capabilities.note: Fixture evaluation is tested; model-generated evaluation is not verified in this snapshot.

capabilities.name: Preflight
capabilities.note: Preflight checks are implemented but current W7900D hardware execution is external evidence.

capabilities.name: Serving Check
capabilities.note: Metadata-only serving checks are tested; generated endpoint inference is not verified here.

capabilities.name: Shakedown
capabilities.note: Dry-run orchestration is covered, while full training and serving execution remain unverified.

capabilities.name: Train
capabilities.note: Training entry point exists; this repository snapshot does not assert a completed hardware run.
